title: crupina crupina
intro: Crupina crupina, also known as yellow starthistle or prickly thistle, is a thistle-like plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and spiny leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Crupina crupina is often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and soothe irritated skin. Additionally, the plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing numerous health benefits such as boosting the immune system, improving respiratory function, and promoting overall well-being.
